title: Ahmedabad、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ahmedabad、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ahmedabad是Gujarat的一個城市，人口約7,650,000。A major industrial and commercial hub in Gujarat, known for its Sabarmati Riverfront, textile industry, and Mahatma Gandhi’s ashram.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
